label: Synthetic B2-type — retail, physical + online, supply chain focus

meta.description: Sells outdoor hiking and camping gear — backpacks, trekking poles, sleeping bags, waterproof jackets. Operates 2 physical stores in Stockholm and Gothenburg plus an online store. Sources from 5 suppliers in Germany and Taiwan.

profile.technical_capability: Medium — operations manager handles tools, IT consultant on retainer

data_availability.notes: Shopify tracks online orders. Physical store sales in Fortnox. Stock managed in Excel across both locations. No unified export available.
data_availability.data_quality_overall: LOW-MEDIUM — online data clean in Shopify, physical store data fragmented.

processes.name: Procurement and Supplier Orders
steps: Stock coordinator checks Excel spreadsheet weekly
Email sent to supplier to request quote or place reorder
Quote compared manually against previous orders
Goods received, stock updated in Excel and Shopify

bottlenecks.description: No automated low-stock alerts — relies on weekly manual check
bottlenecks.time_impact: Stockouts occur 4–5 times per year, each causing 1–2 weeks of lost sales on affected SKUs

bottlenecks.description: Supplier lead time uncertainty — Taiwan shipments unpredictable by up to 2 weeks
bottlenecks.time_impact: Planning horizon unreliable, causes over-ordering as buffer

bottlenecks.description: No consolidated stock view across online and two physical stores
bottlenecks.time_impact: Staff manually check each location's Excel file to answer customer availability questions

processes.demand_forecasting: Based on last year same season, informally
processes.data_available_for_process: Fortnox purchase orders. Excel stock sheets. No delivery tracking data.
